headline: James tightens the grip — +6 stretches the lead to 34.0.
sub: James leads on 34.0, 3 clear of Rob. The day belonged to James (+6), fueled by Norway knocking out Jim's Ivory Coast in the Round of 32. Rob (+6) also climbed. Out of the tournament: Ivory Coast (Jim), Sweden (Jim), Ecuador (Max). Stev (14.0) has ground to make up.
